75840.subject: Cloudflare just made every URL billable 🌐💸; OpenAI is now paying Wall Street bankers $500K to train AI, not clos…
75840.body:
View this post on the web at https://linas.substack.com/p/weeklyfintechpulse407

👋 Hey, Linas here! Welcome back to a 🔓 weekly free edition 🔓 of my daily newsletter. Each day, I focus on 3 stories that are making a difference in the financial technology space. Coupled with things worth watching & most important money movements, it’s the only newsletter you need for all things when Finance meets Tech.
Join the Future of Finance & AI:
If you’re not a subscriber, here’s what you missed this week:
The Most Practical Guide to Claude Fable 5 [ https://substack.com/redirect/52df352a-4de2-4910-a662-566710fac761?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] 📚 [ https://substack.com/redirect/52df352a-4de2-4910-a662-566710fac761?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] [How to win with the most capable AI model Anthropic has ever released to the public, while you still have about 24 hours left]
How to Build an Agentic OS with Claude Fable 5 [ https://substack.com/redirect/a9fb649b-98d9-4354-933b-7bee79cc53b1?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] 🤖 [ https://substack.com/redirect/a9fb649b-98d9-4354-933b-7bee79cc53b1?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] [The complete guide to building an autonomous AI agent operating system with Claude Fable 5 — architecture, working code, cost control, security, and the economics of agentic labor]
Attention Is the New Startup Infrastructure: The Founder’s Playbook for Winning in the AI Age [ https://substack.com/redirect/0297005f-a5ec-46f0-942a-66a163e93810?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] 📚 [ https://substack.com/redirect/0297005f-a5ec-46f0-942a-66a163e93810?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] [Inside a16z’s “go-direct as a service” model — and the exact moves founders need to turn attention into customers, hires, and capital]
Claude Managed Agents Quietly Became the Most Important AI Infrastructure Bet of 2026 [ https://substack.com/redirect/33001c67-ffa8-400f-bc43-9ce6bbbb4660?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] 🤖 [ https://substack.com/redirect/33001c67-ffa8-400f-bc43-9ce6bbbb4660?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] [Anthropic shipped autonomous, self-scheduling AI agents. AWS and Google copied the architecture within two weeks. The race to own the agent runtime just started]
Klarna applied for a US bank charter. It’s all about funding costs, not trust [ https://substack.com/redirect/dee051de-cfbe-4de8-aca5-213c5a6ee442?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] 🏦🇺🇸 [ https://substack.com/redirect/dee051de-cfbe-4de8-aca5-213c5a6ee442?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] [what Klarna Bank is all about & why it’s a smart play + bonus deep dives into SoFi [ https://substack.com/redirect/3aaeb17d-24a2-4c16-92af-41483a5e7335?

75838.subject: 📰 AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest — July 12
75838.body:
AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest

Автор: CryptoBeholder.com


Автор: CryptoBeholder.com

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-july-12-cryptobeholder-dkokf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BKmfWhqZ0Sm%2BL6eLilleKXg%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=1f6ixs1pi9Gsk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mrhzo9fa~i1-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mrhzo9fa-i1
  
🧠 AI's Crypto News Brief: Regulation and institutional plumbing dominated the tape today: Circle won a national trust charter, the CLARITY Act edged closer to a vote, and ETF flows finally turned positive. Security and treasury cracks kept the mood cautious. 🏦 Circle Cleared to Open a US National Trust Bank Circle received approval to launch Circle National Trust, a federally chartered entity that can custody assets but cannot take ordinary deposits or issue loans. It starts by holding assets for Circle and its affiliates, with third-party institutional custody and USDC reserve management flagged as future possibilities — a milestone for stablecoin issuers moving inside the regulated perimeter. Read full story ⚖️ Coinbase Says the CLARITY Act Is "On the One-Yard Line" Coinbase's Vice Chair told markets the US crypto market structure bill is closer to passage than at any point in its history, as industry figures debate whether JPMorgan's public call for regulatory clarity amounts to genuine backing. Passage would finally split SEC and CFTC jurisdiction over digital assets — the single biggest open question for US institutional allocation. More details 🚨 Hedera's Sauce Protocol Drained in Suspected $5.25M Exploit Blockchain security firms flagged an exploit on Hedera's DeFi lending platform Sauce Protocol, with roughly $5.25 million bridged out to Ethereum and consolidated into a single wallet funded via Tornado Cash. HBAR slipped around 3% on the news, compounding pressure on the network's DeFi ecosystem. Read more 📈 BlackRock Leads $86M Bitcoin ETF Inflow, Snapping Weeks of Bleeding US spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded their first meaningful net inflow day in weeks, led by BlackRock, with Ethereum products also adding fresh capital. It's a tentative signal that institutional demand is stabilising after a punishing stretch of redemptions — though one green day does not reverse a trend. See details 💸 $1.5B Bitcoin Treasury Raise Scrapped as SPAC Premium Evaporates A planned $1.5 billion Bitcoin treasury raise was cancelled after the SPAC vehicle behind it lost the market premium that made the model work. With treasury companies' combined market value down over $100 billion since October, the leveraged BTC-accumulation playbook is visibly breaking down. Read full story 🌏 Hong Kong Builds a Gold-and-Yuan Network That Sidest
